subcodes.first_line: God testified before the creation of all things and thereafter that there is none other god beside Him. All majesty, all power, all might, all strength and authority belong unto Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله قبل خلق الاشیاء و بعدها انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الاقتدار و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
